positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a celestial forest at twilight. The scene features silhouetted, gently arched trees with glowing, bioluminescent moss and abstract, flowing star constellations visible through the branches. The composition is highly symmetrical, centered around a gentle, glowing archway or portal. Use deep indigos, sapphire blues, emerald greens, and soft gold accents for a serene, cosmic aesthetic. The artwork should have strong, graphic contrasts and a perfect central focal point, designed for clean, impactful apparel printing.
negative: text, logo, watermark, signature, noisy, blurry, jpeg artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, realistic photograph, bokeh, gradient fade, low contrast
